title: Plush Floral Venezuelan Pecorino Stew
description: A comforting, floral stew that combines Venezuelan flavors with gooey pecorino, perfect for a sick day.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, carrot, celery, and bell pepper; cook for another 4 minutes.
Pour in tomato puree and vegetable broth, and add bay leaf.
Bring mixture to a gentle boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove bay leaf and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Sprinkle chopped parsley and cilantro over the stew, stirring to combine.
Gradually fold in grated pecorino cheese until it melts and thickens the broth into a gooey texture.
Let the stew rest for 5 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve hot, garnished with a few extra parsley leaves if desired.
